acceptance_criteria.description: dotnet build completes with zero errors after test constructor fixes
verify: cmd: cd backend && dotnet build --no-restore 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern '\berror\b' -NotMatch

acceptance_criteria.description: All unit tests pass, including CreateCoupleCommandHandlerTests and JoinCoupleCommandHandlerTests
Uploading a password-protected PDF via OCR upload shows the descriptive error message returned by the backend (HTTP 422) instead of the generic fallback
verify: manual: open OCR upload screen → pick a password-protected PDF → confirm the displayed error text matches the backend OcrException message, not 'Falha ao enviar o arquivo. Tente novamente.'

acceptance_criteria.description: Manual transaction entry button is visible in the Transactions screen and navigates correctly to the new transaction form
verify: manual: open Transactions screen → locate the add-transaction button → tap it → confirm navigation to manual transaction form

acceptance_criteria.description: App launches in Expo Go (dev) without a gradient-related crash or red error screen
verify: manual: npx expo start → scan QR → app reaches home screen without exception

acceptance_criteria.description: Reports tab does not crash in an EAS production build
verify: manual: install EAS production APK → navigate to Reports tab → charts render without crash

acceptance_criteria.description: All icons render correctly across all screens in an EAS production build
verify: manual: install EAS production APK → navigate through all main screens → confirm no broken/missing icons

acceptance_criteria.description: expo-linear-gradient is declared as a direct dependency in mobile/package.json
